scripts.build: vite build && npx terser dist/static/app.js -o dist/static/app.js --compress drop_console=true,passes=2 --mangle toplevel --module && npx cleancss -o dist/static/style.css dist/static/style.css && npx cleancss -o dist/static/admin.css dist/static/admin.css && npx cleancss -o dist/static/fontawesome.css dist/static/fontawesome.css && node scripts/cachebust.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
